commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And one lamb out of the flock, out of two hundred, out of the rich pastures of Israel; for a grain offering, and for a burnt offering, and for peace offerings, to make reconciliation for them, says the Lord GOD. He shall receive the tithe of sheep, and take one out of two hundred, on condition that he furnish victims, ver. (Calmet) The obligation was mutual. Jerome explains it of the high priest and people. (Worthington).
